title: Lucius gate bypassed - pre_commit_check not run before PR #64
description: Alfred committed code without running pre_commit_check(). Lucius Gate was not enforced. The gate exists but has no automatic enforcement - it relies on Alfred self-compliance, which failed.
remediation: Investigate adding pre-commit hook that calls pre_commit_check() automatically
Lucius should block PRs that add new Python files without Build-vs-Buy justification
Scorer should penalize sessions that skip pre_commit_check
